risk.desc: Thermal cycling may cause fatigue in the spring-loaded hinge.
risk.mit: Conduct fatigue testing and use high-temperature resistant materials.

risk.desc: Deployment shock may damage the burn-wire release mechanism.
risk.mit: Add a protective cover around the burn-wire release mechanism.

risk.desc: Radiation exposure may degrade the electrical components.
risk.mit: Use radiation-hardened components and shielding materials.

risk.desc: Solar pressure may cause misalignment of the solar panels.
risk.mit: Implement a locking mechanism to secure the panels in place.

risk.desc: Launch vibration may cause separation of the solar panels.
risk.mit: Ensure proper fastening and use vibration damping materials.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal cycling causing material fatigue in Al 7075 and FR4 components.
risk.mit: Implement thermal cycling tests and material stress analysis during validation.

risk.desc: Risk of harness routing causing electromagnetic interference (EMI) with sensitive electronics.
risk.mit: Conduct EMI testing and ensure proper shielding and separation of signal and power lines.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient grounding leading to electrical noise in the avionics stack.
risk.mit: Verify grounding scheme and ensure signal returns are properly routed.

risk.desc: Risk of improper cable strain relief leading to cable damage during launch vibration.
risk.mit: Ensure all cable exits have strain relief geometry and routing respects minimum bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of mis-mating connectors due to lack of keying or labeling.
risk.mit: Ensure all connectors are clearly labeled and keying is implemented to prevent mis-mating.
